title: 阳光下的罪恶
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\117-阳光下的罪恶-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Sixteen-year-old Linda Marshall struggles with intense self-loathing and frustration, feeling unattractive and socially aimless. She harbors a deep hatred for her stepmother, Elena, whom she views as a "beast" and a corrupting influence on her father, Kenneth Marshall. Linda recalls her arrival on the island and notes that she respects Rosamund Darnley because Rosamund treats her like a normal person. Linda imagines an ideal life where she and her father could enjoy the island's beaches and caves alongside Rosamund, free from Elena's presence.

Meanwhile, Kenneth Marshall confronts Elena in her room as she prepares to go out for the evening. Kenneth questions whether Elena's insistence on visiting the island was motivated by her previous acquaintance with Patrick Redfern. Elena denies this, claiming she had no idea the Redferns were coming to the island and attributing her interest in the location to recommendations from the Larrins. Kenneth accuses Elena of wanting to "stir things up" and ruin the relationship between the young, in-love couple. Elena denies any direct involvement, suggesting that while others may be attracted to her, she is not responsible for their feelings. When Kenneth asks if she admits that Redfern is infatuated with her, Elena dismisses Redfern as a fool and tells Kenneth that he should know she only loves him.
